description:
Follow-up under sbdpi-swx.6.4 after the delegated worker review-gate dogfood failure on runtime sbdpi-5r5-mo11tiwj-u5ipl8.

Scope:
- stream reviewer subprocess activity into an operator-visible log instead of hiding it behind buffered exec output
- preserve truthful timeout / signal / stderr reporting so review failures do not collapse to a generic `exit code 1`
- surface enough context in worker diagnostics/logging that operators can tell whether the reviewer is still running, timed out, or failed for another reason
- add regression coverage around reviewer logging and timeout/error semantics

Goal: when reviewer gating is enabled, failures should be diagnosable from the runtime artifacts without guessing.
title: Make reviewer-gate execution observable and preserve truthful failures
